records.title: A-star route-planning episode
records.admission_rationale: The instance searches alternatives against an explicit goal and cost function, records frontier changes, and returns a justified plan.

source_or_observation_contract.observation_boundary: Only the enumerated states, transitions, rules, inputs, outputs, and recorded history are in scope.
source_or_observation_contract.replay_requirement: A conforming evaluator must be able to replay every enumerated transition from the frozen initial state.

records.formalization_boundary: One finite deterministic graph-search episode; online replanning and learned heuristics are excluded.

candidate_neutral_observations.declared_semantics: Nodes are locations, edges are legal moves, and path cost is the sum of registered edge costs.
candidate_neutral_observations.history_and_path_dependence: The selected route depends on frontier order, accumulated costs, and predecessor history.
candidate_neutral_observations.objectives_or_tasks: Find a minimum-cost route from A to D in the frozen graph.
candidate_neutral_observations.commitment_or_alternative_structure: Candidate paths compete until the lowest-cost goal path A-B-C-D is selected.
candidate_neutral_observations.uncertainty_and_revision: Alternatives remain uncertain until expanded; no stochastic transition uncertainty.
candidate_neutral_observations.provenance_and_correspondence_limits: Optimality is relative to the frozen graph, costs, and heuristic assumptions.

formal_system.commitment_or_alternative_structure: Candidate paths compete until the lowest-cost goal path A-B-C-D is selected.

records.title: Model-based pump fault diagnosis
records.admission_rationale: The instance generates competing explanations for observations, eliminates inconsistent explanations, and records the surviving diagnosis.

source_or_observation_contract.observation_boundary: Only the enumerated states, transitions, rules, inputs, outputs, and recorded history are in scope.
source_or_observation_contract.replay_requirement: A conforming evaluator must be able to replay every enumerated transition from the frozen initial state.

records.formalization_boundary: Single-shot consistency diagnosis over three registered candidates; continuous physics and unmodeled faults are excluded.

transitions_and_constraints: candidate must entail all observations under component model
candidate_neutral_observations.declared_semantics: Component models relate operating modes to expected pressure and flow observations.
candidate_neutral_observations.history_and_path_dependence: Eliminated candidates and their conflicting predictions are preserved.
candidate_neutral_observations.objectives_or_tasks: Explain low pressure with normal motor current using the frozen pump model.
candidate_neutral_observations.commitment_or_alternative_structure: Three explanations are compared; valve_blockage survives the frozen consistency test.
candidate_neutral_observations.uncertainty_and_revision: Multiple explanations are initially open; revision occurs through consistency elimination.
candidate_neutral_observations.provenance_and_correspondence_limits: The diagnosis is model-relative and does not assert actual equipment failure.

formal_system.commitment_or_alternative_structure: Three explanations are compared; valve_blockage survives the frozen consistency test.

records.title: Rule-hierarchy policy adjudication
records.admission_rationale: The instance resolves a policy question by combining facts, authority hierarchy, an exception, and a written rationale.

source_or_observation_contract.observation_boundary: Only the enumerated states, transitions, rules, inputs, outputs, and recorded history are in scope.
source_or_observation_contract.replay_requirement: A conforming evaluator must be able to replay every enumerated transition from the frozen initial state.

records.formalization_boundary: Synthetic policy adjudication with two rules; real legal interpretation, discretion, and external sources are excluded.

candidate_neutral_observations.declared_semantics: Rules are interpreted as a frozen organizational policy hierarchy, not as claims about any real jurisdiction.
candidate_neutral_observations.history_and_path_dependence: The decision depends on the sequence of identifying the general rule, exception, and authority relation.
candidate_neutral_observations.objectives_or_tasks: Decide whether emergency access is permitted despite a general after-hours prohibition.
candidate_neutral_observations.commitment_or_alternative_structure: Competing prohibited/permitted outcomes are resolved by the registered priority rule.
candidate_neutral_observations.uncertainty_and_revision: Interpretive uncertainty is bounded to the listed rule texts; no external precedent is admitted.
candidate_neutral_observations.provenance_and_correspondence_limits: The result is not legal advice and does not generalize beyond the frozen policy text.

priority: R2 overrides R1 for emergency facts
formal_system.commitment_or_alternative_structure: Competing prohibited/permitted outcomes are resolved by the registered priority rule.
